3326020.name: Snake in the Dark: First Bite
3326020.description:
Sure, you've played Snake. But can you stand the brutal truth behind it? Snake in the Dark is a total re-imagination of the timeless arcade and puzzle game classics like Snake and Sokoban. Fun gameplay you know delivered with more puzzling twisssts than you expect!

𓆙       EAT AND SHINE!

The dungeon is dark, and the snake can only see a few feet ahead. Consuming shiny white mice gives it a short glimpse of the whole level. Where are the walls? Where is the food? Where's your tail? Shine a light and find out!

𓆙       GROW BIG TO WIN!

Your ultimate goal in each level is to open the exit gate by simultaneously pressing all the pressure-plate switches and reach it while it's open. Snake too short? No problem! Eat more light cubes to get BIG and reach all the switches at once.

𓆙       PUSH STONES & SOLVE PUZZLES!

Look! A stone ball! Why not push it and use it to weigh that switch and open the doors? And what's this? A sinkhole in the floor is blocking your way? Fill it with another stone ball to make a bridge to slither over. Solve your problems Sokoban-style!

𓆙       Snake in the Dark DEMO is:

★ First 16 out of over 100 puzzling levels of arcade action and quick thinking

★ Fresh take on time-proven gameplay mechanics like Snake and Sokoban

★ Glorious retro graphics and audio

𓆙       WISHLIST & FOLLOW NOW!
